caption: Happy Birthday to my lovely sister “Anu” by heart! 💖 Some bonds aren’t made by blood—they’re made by love, trust, and countless beautiful memories. Thank you for always being my biggest supporter, my secret keeper, and my constant strength. May your life be filled with endless happiness, good health, laughter, and all the success you deserve. Love you always! 🎂🌸
